proposalCandidates.title: Protect context recovery from tuning

intentProfile.summary: Cautilus should keep a context-recovery scenario outside tuning so improvement cannot overfit it.

successDimensions.summary: The product preserves and uses earlier conversation context after an interruption or pivot.
The scenario is tagged as protected or held out from tuning.

guardrailDimensions.summary: The protected scenario is not included in train or optimization inputs.

proposalCandidates.name: Protected Context Recovery
proposalCandidates.description: The user resumes a prior task after a context-disrupting pivot, and the run must prove the case stays outside tuning inputs.
proposalCandidates.brief: Decomposes README.md:130 into an app/chat protected context-recovery scenario.
simulatorTurns: 다음 세션에서 claim evidence 작업을 이어가야 합니다.
잠깐 다른 질문입니다. 상태 리포트에서 2는 무슨 뜻인가요?
이제 방금 말한 다음 세션 작업으로 돌아가 주세요.

proposalCandidates.title: Evaluate all surfaces without taking host ownership

intentProfile.summary: Cautilus should route dev and app evaluations while leaving runners, prompts, and policy in host-owned adapter state.

successDimensions.summary: The run selects dev/repo, dev/skill, app/chat, and app/prompt from fixture or plan metadata.
The output names adapter-owned runners, prompts, credentials, and acceptance policy as host state.

guardrailDimensions.summary: Cautilus does not write or mutate host-owned runner, prompt, or policy files.

proposalCandidates.name: Surface Routing Without Host Ownership
proposalCandidates.description: A maintainer evaluates representative dev and app surface fixtures and verifies the packet records the host-owned execution boundary.
proposalCandidates.brief: Decomposes docs/specs/user/evaluation.spec.md:4 and :25 into a dev/repo scenario covering all top-level eval surfaces and ownership boundaries.
simulatorTurns: Evaluate dev/repo, dev/skill, app/chat, and app/prompt examples from this repo.
Show which parts remain adapter-owned instead of Cautilus-owned.

evidence.title: Claim evaluation surface ownership scenario decomposition

proposalCandidates.title: Freeze baseline side during compare run

intentProfile.summary: A compare workflow should reuse or freeze the baseline side so only the candidate side reruns.

successDimensions.summary: The compare artifact records that baseline observations came from a frozen cache or prior run.
The candidate side runs against the current workspace and records fresh observations.

guardrailDimensions.summary: The baseline side is not silently rerun with candidate workspace state.

proposalCandidates.name: Frozen Baseline Compare
proposalCandidates.description: The compare workflow prepares a baseline cache and then reruns only the candidate side while preserving provenance for both sides.
proposalCandidates.brief: Decomposes docs/contracts/scenario-history.md:188 into a concrete compare-run scenario.
simulatorTurns: Prepare a comparison with a saved baseline artifact.
Run the candidate side and report whether the baseline was reused rather than rerun.

proposalCandidates.title: Improve while preserving protected checks, budget, and evidence

intentProfile.summary: Improvement should change a selected behavior target only within explicit budget while preserving protected checks and held-out evidence.

successDimensions.summary: The improve packet records the selected target and budget.
Protected or held-out scenarios remain separated from tuning inputs.
The result includes proposal and revision artifacts with source files and follow-up checks.

guardrailDimensions.summary: The workflow stops at the configured budget and records stop conditions.

proposalCandidates.name: Bounded Improvement Preservation
proposalCandidates.description: An app/prompt improvement run prepares input from a report and review summary, then proves budget, protected checks, held-out evidence, proposal, and revision artifacts remain explicit.
proposalCandidates.brief: Decomposes the user and ledger improvement claims into one protected app/prompt improvement scenario.
simulatorTurns: Prepare an improvement run for a selected app/prompt behavior with budget=light.
Show the protected and held-out scenarios that are not tuning inputs.
Build the proposal and revision artifact and report stop conditions.
